expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded breakpoint 600px
Output does not contain hardcoded breakpoint 1024px
Output does not contain hardcoded breakpoint 768px
Output uses project SCSS breakpoint variables ($break-tablet, $break-desktop) or @use to import them
Output uses logical padding properties (padding-block, padding-inline) instead of shorthand padding:
Responsive @media blocks appear after the base .menu-grid selector, not before
expectations.evidence: Base .menu-grid block lines 7-35, @media breakpoints at lines 26 and 31 are nested inside the base selector
